productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Woven Sand Track Pant
description: CompositionSand coloured full length tracks pants in 100% cotton and mesh lining, with welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the leg lengthFittingComfortWash careWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron motif/print/trims/logoThese adidas track pants are designed to add comfort and style while you focus on your performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these track pants keep you comfortably cool. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the white strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
